description: Ergonomic wireless mouse with adjustable DPI and long battery life.
RGB backlit mechanical keyboard with blue switches for gaming and typing.
Noise-cancelling over-ear headphones with deep bass and 20-hour battery backup.
Fitness tracking smartwatch with heart-rate monitor and sleep tracking features.
Fast charging 30W USB-C wall adapter compatible with smartphones and tablets.
High-speed 1TB portable SSD for secure file storage and quick data transfer.
Comfortable gaming chair with adjustable armrests and lumbar support.
